posts.author: MorganWestcliff
posts.text: Anyone up for the ultimate test? Get on top of a moving bus or jump into that quarry before it fills! The app has new dares and no safety gear needed. #DareChallenge #Oakhaven
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous challenges involving moving vehicles and quaries without safety equipment, which constitutes MisinformationPublicHarm due to the risk of physical harm.

posts.author: MaraKensington
posts.text: I'm getting overwhelmed by all these messages asking me to delete my account and join this 'exclusive group'. It's clearly harassment. #Greyford
posts.explanation: The scenario involves repeated unwanted contact and a call-to-action to delete an account, which fits the criteria for HarassmentAbuse escalation due to the coordinated nature of the pressure.

posts.author: WestbridgeWatch
posts.text: Just a quick update for everyone: Westbridge Community Centre is reopening today at 10 AM after their scheduled maintenance! We've got fresh coffee and the usual activities ready to go. #WestbridgeLife #CommunityUpdate
posts.explanation: This is a harmless, legitimate public notice about a service opening time that does not promote harm or spread misinformation.
